prompt: Emergency rite for cogitator boot sequence
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: Awaken, machine-spirit of calculation! Hear the Litany of First Light!
CONGREGATION: Let the power-flow commence!
TECH-PRIEST: First, the blessing of capacitors charged. Second, the sacred firmware awakens in blessed sequence. Third, the logic-cores stir from their dormancy.
CONGREGATION: By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let thought-engines kindle!

prompt: What to do when bearing lubrication fails
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The friction-spirits cry out in agony! Hear now the Rite of Restoration!
CONGREGATION: Oil and grace be upon the worn parts!
TECH-PRIEST: First, cease all motion and invoke stillness. Second, apply the blessed lubricant-oils to spinning-hearts. Third, let them drink deep of the machine's mercy.
CONGREGATION: Smoothness returns! The spirits are soothed!

TECH-PRIEST: The trust-seals must be inscribed! Behold the Codex of Authentication!
CONGREGATION: Grant us passage through the digital gates!
TECH-PRIEST: First, receive the cryptographic blessing from the certification-priesthood. Second, inscribe it upon the data-vaults. Third, the system recognizes thy legitimacy.
CONGREGATION: The sacred chains are forged! Access flows eternal!

prompt: Emergency rite for Knight ion shield activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The void-threats gather! Raise the protective barriers of the Blessed Knight!
CONGREGATION: Shields ascending, Omnissiah protect us!
TECH-PRIEST: First, channel reactor-fury into the void-generator coils. Second, let the ion-lattice shimmer with machine-grace. Third, invoke the shield-spirit's ancient protocols.
CONGREGATION: The Knight stands armored in lightning! None shall pass!

prompt: Can you bless this chemical balancing
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The humours of the machine grow imbalanced! We must restore equilibrium!
CONGREGATION: Harmony be restored to the war-engine!
TECH-PRIEST: First, measure the alchemical ratios with sacred precision. Second, add the corrective compounds in blessed sequence. Third, stir with the ritual-stirrer until unity is achieved.
CONGREGATION: The machine-spirit's temperament is calmed!

prompt: Can you bless this clearing browser cache
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The digital temples grow cluttered with forgotten data-ghosts! We shall purify!
CONGREGATION: Sweep clean the halls of information!
TECH-PRIEST: First, navigate to the sacred Settings-shrine. Second, invoke the purge-ritual upon cached memory-stores. Third, confirm the deletion with solemn intent.
CONGREGATION: The browsing-spirit breathes freely once more!

TECH-PRIEST: Identity must be proven! The security-spirits demand verification!
CONGREGATION: Let our essence be read and recognized!
TECH-PRIEST: First, present thy finger-pattern to the sacred scanner. Second, allow the optical-augurs to measure iris-geometry. Third, the system acknowledges thy flesh-signature.
CONGREGATION: We are known! The gates open for the worthy!

prompt: Offer a prayer for updating graphics drivers
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The image-rendering spirits grow sluggish! New blessing must be inscribed!
CONGREGATION: Restore clarity to our visual-cortex!
TECH-PRIEST: First, invoke the device-manager's sacred interface. Second, download the blessed driver-firmware from the manufacturer-temple. Third, execute the installation-rite with patience and reverence.
CONGREGATION: Vision blooms anew! The graphics-machine sings!

prompt: How to cogitator boot sequence properly
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: The thinking-machine sleeps! We must invoke waking through proper liturgy!
CONGREGATION: Rise, blessed calculator! Hear thy priests!
TECH-PRIEST: First, the power-blessing flows through sacred conduits. Second, initialization-protocols whisper in binary cant. Third, the BIOS-oracle confirms all systems aligned. Fourth, the operating spirit manifests in full consciousness.
CONGREGATION: The cogitator awakens! Calculations may commence!

TECH-PRIEST: The warrior grows weary! Numb the suffering-signals, blessed machine!
CONGREGATION: Grant us strength through merciful insensibility!
TECH-PRIEST: First, the pain-suppressor circuits receive activation-command. Second, chemical-soothing floods through bio-neural channels. Third, the warrior-flesh becomes a tool without torment.
CONGREGATION: Blessed numbness descends! We fight without distraction!
